key_items: Bitcoin spot ETF net outflows for 17 of last 19 days ($5.6B total) as capital rotates to AI sector
Bitcoin crashed to $61,349 with $1.76B in liquidations; Fear Index at 12 (FTX crash levels)
Corporate crypto holders dumping positions (Forward Industries moving $32M SOL to exchange, Arthur Hayes liquidating ZEC)
reasoning: Bitcoin faces a multi-front liquidity crisis with institutional ETF outflows accelerating, capital rotation to AI equities, and forced selling by corporate treasury holders. While mining cost support near $60K suggests a technical floor, the combination of depleted leverage, low sentiment, and sustained institutional redemptions creates downside vulnerability in the 1-7 day window.
risks: Continued institutional ETF redemptions combined with miner/corporate liquidations could trigger another leg down toward $54K-$57K support levels if risk sentiment deteriorates further or S&P 500 weakness accelerates.
